question: Can ocean geoengineering projects safely combat climate change without environmental risks?
topic: Corrects oversimplified media coverage of geoengineering with realistic risk assessment

sources.name: A Research Strategy for Ocean-based Carbon Dioxide Removal and Sequestration

discovery_sources.text: Climate Change: Controversial geoengineering project sees scientists pump 65,000 litres of chemicals into the ocean to stop global warming
